form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding facing the starter for the second time. At debut broke in score up and was out of position at the start 5th (Fr2) over 1690m at Kilmore, beaten 14 m by Master Louey (2:04.30) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 2 at $16. Sure to be thereabouts.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old gelding facing the starter for the second time. At debut broke in score up and was out of position at the start 5th (Fr2) over 1690m at Kilmore, beaten 14 m by Master Louey (2:04.30) in 3yo MAIDEN on April 2 at $16. Sure to be thereabouts.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he 4th (Sr1) over 1690m at Kilmore was 3rd-3.1m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 9 m by Banjo Star (2:05.10) in 2yo MAIDEN on November 13 at $17. Can open the prep with a bold run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run he 4th (Sr1) over 1690m at Kilmore was 3rd-3.1m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 9 m by Banjo Star (2:05.10) in 2yo MAIDEN on November 13 at $17. Can open the prep with a bold run.

form.formComment: Finished second at her last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 2 metres behind Master Louey at Kilmore over 1690m 3yo MAIDEN on April 2. Going along well. Top prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second at her last two starts since resuming from a spell. Last outing was beaten 2 metres behind Master Louey at Kilmore over 1690m 3yo MAIDEN on April 2. Going along well. Top prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in and contacted several marker pegs rounding the final turn.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind All Over It at Bendigo over 2150m in a MAIDEN on April 8 at $9.50. Performed better the start before with a good run when 2nd (Fr3) over 1750m after showing early speed at Swan Hill was leading by 0.8 at the bell, beaten a head by Steel Miki (2:12.50) in MAIDEN on March 31 at $6. Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

Well placed, should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out around the first turn.
Hung out at various stages of the event.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Sweet Lou - Royal Delera) making her debut. Finished second in a trial on April 7 at Melton over 2240m. Sure to be tough to beat despite the lack of race experience.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Three-year-old filly (Sweet Lou - Royal Delera) making her debut. Finished second in a trial on April 7 at Melton over 2240m. Sure to be tough to beat despite the lack of race experience.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 1650m after being wide early at Bendigo, beaten 23 m by Chainsmoke (2:00.70) in 2yo MAIDEN on May 7 at $31. Might be better for this run.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding lining up for the second time. At debut was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr5) over 1690m after racing wide at Shepparton was 10th-13.41 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Miss Doobee (2:02.30) in MAIDEN on March 24 at $11. Likely to struggle.
